message:
chore(beads): file ft-xkpy1 UX follow-up

Primary /ux-audit finding shipped as ride-along in c8252b9d
(ft-bkgbq centralize MCP workflow assembly): all 7 MCP_ERR_POLICY
hard-deny sites in mcp_tools.rs now pass POLICY_DENY_HINT instead of
None as the hint, naming two actionable recovery paths
(config.safety.rules / policy_denied_audit). Four secondary findings
(robot code drift vs README, robot-mode hint uniformity, toon vs
json format-claim measurement, envelope conciseness) filed as
ft-xkpy1 follow-ups.
